'''''Pizzazz'' 5''' is the fifth issue in the [[Marvel Comics]] popular culture monthly magazine. This issue was cover-dated [[February]] [[1978]] and featured the continuation of the serialized ''[[Star Wars]]'' comic ''[[The Keeper's World]]''.<ref name="Issue 5" />

The cover illustration features [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] as a [[Drum/Legends|drummer]] playing in a [[Band/Legends|band]] led by singer [[Wikipedia:Linda Ronstadt|Linda Ronstadt]], and including Marvel characters [[Wikipedia:Doctor Strange|Doctor Strange]] and [[Wikipedia:Captain America|Captain America]] playing [[Guitar/Legends|guitar]].<ref name="Issue 5" />
